steps.t: Barad-dûr is located in eastern Dor Amarth. You should examine the chamber of Narchraw again.
Barad-dûr is located in eastern Dor Amarth. You should examine the chamber of Narchraw again.
Escape Barad-dûr and fight off Glúrugoth's guards.
Lômazar can be found at the Ruins of Díngarth. You should speak with Lômazar.
